features.name: wire assignment inside ifdef used outside
features.description: Code should include a wire assigned only inside an `ifdef block but referenced outside that conditional, creating a use-before-assignment risk when the ifdef guard is false

features.name: comb.or with identical operands as wire assign source
features.description: Code should include a comb.or operation where both operands are the same variable, used as a source for wire assignment inside a conditional block
